seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: The email must include a Chinese idiom.
new_constraint: The email must not contain any Chinese idioms.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. The email must include a Chinese idiom. The email must not contain any Chinese idioms.
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo - [Your Company Name] Interested in [Product Name]

Dear [Developer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is [Your Name] and I am a [Your Title] at [Your Company Name]. We have been following the work on [Product Name] with great interest, and we are very impressed by [mention something specific you like about the product, e.g., its functionality, recent updates, or use case].

We believe that [Product Name] could significantly benefit our team by helping us to [mention a specific goal or problem your company has, e.g., streamline our deployment process or improve data visualization].

Would you be available for a brief product demonstration sometime in the coming weeks? We are flexible and happy to work around your schedule. Please let me know what days or times might work best for you.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company Name]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
